meaning: n.科隆香水,古龙香人,科隆(或古龙)香锭(或香膏)
examples: This cologne, like wine, improves with age.
Cologne is not so very far downriver from Mainz.
This delightfully refreshing cologne can be splashed on liberally.
Breker of Auction Team Breker, which auctioned off a roster of vintage tech Saturday in Cologne.
Printed in Cologne and Worms, 6000 copies were smuggled into England, some in bales of cloth.
